title: Siphoneranthemum eldorado
taxonomy: Siphoneranthemum eldorado is a plant species that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This classification places it within the order Poales, which comprises various flowering plants. As a member of the Bromeliaceae family, Siphoneranthemum eldorado is closely related to other plants such as air plants and pineapples. The family Bromeliaceae is further divided into several genera, with Siphoneranthemum being one of them. The classification of Siphoneranthemum eldorado provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
